name: Fluff Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, cook the flour and milk until thick.
2. Stir well and set aside to cool (keep mixture covered as it cools).
3. In a bowl, beat the sugar, butter or margarine, and shortening using high speed of mixer until fluffy.
4. Add the milk mixture and vanilla.
5. Continue beating until the icing is very fluffy.
